title: Polish sample factory run admission fixture
problem: The sample factory run needs clear operator-facing fixture wording that demonstrates draft admission, AC normalization, and policy-gated promotion without changing runtime behavior.
context: Protostar is an existing TypeScript workspace whose factory CLI promotes draft intent JSON before composing deterministic planning, execution, review, evaluation, and delivery artifacts.

acceptanceCriteria.statement: The sample factory run fixture documents draft admission artifacts and policy-gated promotion without changing runtime behavior.
The default factory CLI command promotes the sample draft through admission and writes the deterministic run bundle.

toolPermissions.reason: Build the TypeScript workspace before running the sample factory command.
Run the deterministic sample factory command and inspect its local artifacts.

constraints: Keep the change bounded to sample intent fixtures and sample-run documentation.
Do not modify execution, review repair, delivery, or Dogpile planning internals.
stopConditions: Stop if deterministic admission reports ambiguity above 0.20.
Stop if policy reports unresolved capability-envelope findings.
